sqlMap.select: WITH /* base_no별 로우 전체 SUM (rank_ <= 205) */ expected AS ( SELECT base_no , SUM(CASE gndr_rt WHEN '10' THEN 2 WHEN '01' THEN 0 WHEN '00' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS exp_m , SUM(CASE gndr_rt WHEN '10' THEN 0 WHEN '01' THEN 2 WHEN '00' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS exp_f , SUM(CASE gndr_rt WHEN '00' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END) AS exp_g FROM pokedex WHERE rank_ <= 205 GROUP BY base_no ), /* pogo5f: y로 시작하는 로우 (base_no 기준) */ actual_f AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'ym%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_m , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'yf%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_f , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'yg%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_g FROM pogo5f p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no WHERE p.als LIKE 'y%' GROUP BY pk.base_no ), /* pogo5f: 전체 로우 (base_no 기준) */ all_f AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_m , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'f' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_f , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'g' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_g FROM pogo5f p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no GROUP BY pk.base_no ), /* pogo5s: y로 시작하는 로우 (base_no 기준) */ actual_s AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'ym%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_m , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'yf%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_f , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'yg%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_g FROM pogo5s p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no WHERE p.als LIKE 'y%' GROUP BY pk.base_no ), /* pogo5s: 전체 로우 (base_no 기준) */ all_s AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_m , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'f' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_f , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'g' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_g FROM pogo5s p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no GROUP BY pk.base_no ), /* pogo5t: y로 시작하는 로우 (base_no 기준) */ actual_t AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'ym%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_m , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'yf%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_f , SUM(CASE WHEN p.als LIKE 'yg%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS act_g FROM pogo5t p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no WHERE p.als LIKE 'y%' GROUP BY pk.base_no ), /* pogo5t: 전체 로우 (base_no 기준) */ all_t AS ( SELECT pk.base_no AS base_no , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_m , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'f' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_f , SUM(CASE WHEN p.gndr = 'g' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS all_g FROM pogo5t p JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = p.no GROUP BY pk.base_no ) SELECT e.base_no "basId" , pk.dv "div" , pk.name "name" , e.exp_m "expM" , e.exp_f "expF" , e.exp_g "expG" , IFNULL(af.act_m, 0) "actFM" , IFNULL(af.act_f, 0) "actFF" , IFNULL(af.act_g, 0) "actFG" , IFNULL(as_.act_m, 0) "actSM" , IFNULL(as_.act_f, 0) "actSF" , IFNULL(as_.act_g, 0) "actSG" , IFNULL(at_.act_m, 0) "actTM" , IFNULL(at_.act_f, 0) "actTF" , IFNULL(at_.act_g, 0) "actTG" FROM expected e JOIN pokedex pk ON pk.no = e.base_no LEFT JOIN actual_f af ON af.base_no = e.base_no LEFT JOIN all_f alf ON alf.base_no = e.base_no LEFT JOIN actual_s as_ ON as_.base_no = e.base_no LEFT JOIN all_s als ON als.base_no = e.base_no LEFT JOIN actual_t at_ ON at_.base_no = e.base_no LEFT JOIN all_t alt ON alt.base_no = e.base_no WHERE /* 5f 불통: 기대값과 다르고, y행이 전체행보다 적음 (채울 수 있는데 안 채움) */ ((IFNULL(af.act_m, 0) <> e.exp_m OR IFNULL(af.act_f, 0) <> e.exp_f OR IFNULL(af.act_g, 0) <> e.exp_g) AND (IFNULL(af.act_m, 0) <> IFNULL(alf.all_m, 0) OR IFNULL(af.act_f, 0) <> IFNULL(alf.all_f, 0) OR IFNULL(af.act_g, 0) <> IFNULL(alf.all_g, 0))) OR /* 5s 불통 */ ((IFNULL(as_.act_m, 0) <> e.exp_m OR IFNULL(as_.act_f, 0) <> e.exp_f OR IFNULL(as_.act_g, 0) <> e.exp_g) AND (IFNULL(as_.act_m, 0) <> IFNULL(als.all_m, 0) OR IFNULL(as_.act_f, 0) <> IFNULL(als.all_f, 0) OR IFNULL(as_.act_g, 0) <> IFNULL(als.all_g, 0))) OR /* 5t 불통 */ ((IFNULL(at_.act_m, 0) <> e.exp_m OR IFNULL(at_.act_f, 0) <> e.exp_f OR IFNULL(at_.act_g, 0) <> e.exp_g) AND (IFNULL(at_.act_m, 0) <> IFNULL(alt.all_m, 0) OR IFNULL(at_.act_f, 0) <> IFNULL(alt.all_f, 0) OR IFNULL(at_.act_g, 0) <> IFNULL(alt.all_g, 0))) ORDER BY pk.name
